scripts.text:
SELECT 
A.CalendarDate,
B.Division,
B.BranchID,
B.ProductID
INTO #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH_N1
FROM
	(SELECT DISTINCT CalendarDate  FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] ) A
	JOIN 
	(SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
	WHERE BranchID IS NOT NULL) B
	ON 1=1;




--#################################################################
--########################## BY DIVISION ##########################
--#################################################################




SELECT 
Division,
Identifier,
BranchID,
ProductID,
CalendarDate,
DAY,
HolidayName,
CASE WHEN AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS=0 THEN 0 
		ELSE 
		(	CAST(CAST(NET_ISSUED AS DECIMAL(8,4))/CAST(AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS AS DECIMAL(8,4)) AS DECIMAL(8,4)) 
			)
		END AS HOLIDAY_ADJ_NET_ISSUED,
		
		
CASE WHEN AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS=0 THEN 0 
		ELSE 
		(	CAST(CAST(DEMO AS DECIMAL(8,4))/CAST(AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS AS DECIMAL(8,4)) AS DECIMAL(8,4)) 
			)
		END AS HOLIDAY_ADJ_DEMO,


CASE WHEN AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS=0 THEN 0 
		ELSE 
		(	CAST(CAST(SOLD AS DECIMAL(8,4))/CAST(AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS AS DECIMAL(8,4)) AS DECIMAL(8,4)) 
			)
		END AS HOLIDAY_ADJ_SOLD,
		
CASE WHEN AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS=0 THEN 0 
		ELSE 
		(	CAST(CAST(SET_COUNT AS DECIMAL(8,4))/CAST(AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS AS DECIMAL(8,4)) AS DECIMAL(8,4)) 
			)
		END AS HOLIDAY_ADJ_SET_COUNT
		
		
INTO #T_HOLIDAY_ADJ_COMBINED
FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		Division,
		Identifier,
		BranchID,
		ProductID,
		CalendarDate,
		DAY,
		NET_ISSUED,
		DEMO,
		SOLD,
		SET_COUNT,
		--NET_ISSUED_7,
		--NET_ISSUED_14,
		--NET_ISSUED_21,
		--NET_ISSUED_28,
		CAST(
				CAST(
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_7  = 0 THEN NET_ISSUED_7  ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN NET_ISSUED_14 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN NET_ISSUED_21 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN NET_ISSUED_28 ELSE 0 END, 0)
				
					AS DECIMAL(8,4)) / 
				
				CAST(
					NULLIF(
						(CASE WHEN NET_ISSUED_7  IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_7  = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN NET_ISSUED_14 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN NET_ISSUED_21 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN NET_ISSUED_28 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
					0)
					AS DECIMAL(8,4))
						
			AS DECIMAL(8,4)) AS AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS,  -- If Holiday Falls on the AVG days , then Skip that day.
			
			
		CAST(
				CAST(
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_7  = 0 THEN DEMO_7  ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN DEMO_14 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN DEMO_21 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN DEMO_28 ELSE 0 END, 0)
				
					AS DECIMAL(8,4)) / 
				
				CAST(
					NULLIF(
						(CASE WHEN DEMO_7  IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_7  = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN DEMO_14 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN DEMO_21 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN DEMO_28 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
					0)
					AS DECIMAL(8,4))
						
			AS DECIMAL(8,4)) AS AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS,
			
			
		
		CAST(
				CAST(
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_7  = 0 THEN SOLD_7  ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN SOLD_14 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN SOLD_21 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN SOLD_28 ELSE 0 END, 0)
				
					AS DECIMAL(8,4)) / 
				
				CAST(
					NULLIF(
						(CASE WHEN SOLD_7  IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_7  = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN SOLD_14 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN SOLD_21 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN SOLD_28 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
					0)
					AS DECIMAL(8,4))
						
			AS DECIMAL(8,4)) AS AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS,
			
			
			
		
		CAST(
				CAST(
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_7  = 0 THEN SET_COUNT_7  ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN SET_COUNT_14 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN SET_COUNT_21 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN SET_COUNT_28 ELSE 0 END, 0)
				
					AS DECIMAL(8,4)) / 
				
				CAST(
					NULLIF(
						(CASE WHEN SET_COUNT_7  IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_7  = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN SET_COUNT_14 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN SET_COUNT_21 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN SET_COUNT_28 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
					0)
					AS DECIMAL(8,4))
						
			AS DECIMAL(8,4)) AS AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS

		
		FROM 
			(
				SELECT 
					Division,
					Identifier,
					BranchID,
					ProductID,
					CalendarDate,
					DAY,
					NET_ISSUED,
					DEMO,
					SOLD,
					SET_COUNT,
					LAG(NET_ISSUED,7)  OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate)  AS NET_ISSUED_7,
					LAG(NET_ISSUED,14) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS NET_ISSUED_14,
					LAG(NET_ISSUED,21) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS NET_ISSUED_21,
					LAG(NET_ISSUED,28) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS NET_ISSUED_28,
					
					LAG(DEMO,7)  OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS DEMO_7,
					LAG(DEMO,14) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS DEMO_14,
					LAG(DEMO,21) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS DEMO_21,
					LAG(DEMO,28) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS DEMO_28,
					
					LAG(SOLD,7)  OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS SOLD_7,
					LAG(SOLD,14) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS SOLD_14,
					LAG(SOLD,21) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS SOLD_21,
					LAG(SOLD,28) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS SOLD_28,
					
					LAG(SET_COUNT,7)  OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS SET_COUNT_7,
					LAG(SET_COUNT,14) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS SET_COUNT_14,
					LAG(SET_COUNT,21) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS SET_COUNT_21,
					LAG(SET_COUNT,28) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS SET_COUNT_28,
					
					LAG(HolidayFlag,7)  OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS HolidayFlag_7,
					LAG(HolidayFlag,14) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS HolidayFlag_14,
					LAG(HolidayFlag,21) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS HolidayFlag_21,
					LAG(HolidayFlag,28) OVER (PARTITION BY  Identifier,Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS HolidayFlag_28
					
					FROM
					(
					
					-- BY Division
					
						SELECT 
						A.Division,
						
						'BY_DIVISION' AS Identifier,
						CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID,
						CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID,
						
						(A.CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
						DATENAME(WEEKDAY, A.CalendarDate) AS DAY,
						CASE WHEN C.HolidayDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS HolidayFlag,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.NET_ISSUED,0)) 	AS NET_ISSUED,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.DEMO,0)) 		AS DEMO,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.SOLD,0))			AS SOLD,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.SET_COUNT,0))	AS SET_COUNT
						FROM #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH_N1 A 
							LEFT JOIN [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] B 
							ON A.Division = B.DIVISION
							AND A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
							AND A.BranchID = B.BranchID
							AND A.ProductID = B.ProductID
						
						LEFT JOIN [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR] C
						ON A.CalendarDate = C.HolidayDate
						GROUP BY A.Division,
						--A.BranchID,
						--A.ProductID,
						(A.CalendarDate),
						DATENAME(WEEKDAY, A.CalendarDate),
						CASE WHEN C.HolidayDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
						
						
						UNION ALL 
						
						
						-- BY MARKET
						
						SELECT 
						A.Division,
						
						'BY_MARKET' AS Identifier,
						A.BranchID AS BranchID,
						CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID,
						
						(A.CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
						DATENAME(WEEKDAY, A.CalendarDate) AS DAY,
						CASE WHEN C.HolidayDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS HolidayFlag,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.NET_ISSUED,0)) 	AS NET_ISSUED,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.DEMO,0)) 		AS DEMO,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.SOLD,0))			AS SOLD,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.SET_COUNT,0))	AS SET_COUNT
						FROM #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH_N1 A 
							LEFT JOIN [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] B 
							ON A.Division = B.DIVISION
							AND A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
							AND A.BranchID = B.BranchID
							AND A.ProductID = B.ProductID
						
						LEFT JOIN [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR] C
						ON A.CalendarDate = C.HolidayDate
						GROUP BY A.Division,
						A.BranchID,
						--A.ProductID,
						(A.CalendarDate),
						DATENAME(WEEKDAY, A.CalendarDate),
						CASE WHEN C.HolidayDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
						
						
						UNION ALL 
						
						
						-- BY PRODUCT 
						
						SELECT 
						A.Division,
						
						'BY_PRODUCT' AS Identifier,
						CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID,
						A.ProductID AS ProductID,
						
						(A.CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
						DATENAME(WEEKDAY, A.CalendarDate) AS DAY,
						CASE WHEN C.HolidayDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS HolidayFlag,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.NET_ISSUED,0)) 	AS NET_ISSUED,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.DEMO,0)) 		AS DEMO,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.SOLD,0))			AS SOLD,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.SET_COUNT,0))	AS SET_COUNT
						FROM #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH_N1 A 
							LEFT JOIN [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] B 
							ON A.Division = B.DIVISION
							AND A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
							AND A.BranchID = B.BranchID
							AND A.ProductID = B.ProductID
						
						LEFT JOIN [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR] C
						ON A.CalendarDate = C.HolidayDate
						GROUP BY A.Division,
						--A.BranchID,
						A.ProductID,
						(A.CalendarDate),
						DATENAME(WEEKDAY, A.CalendarDate),
						CASE WHEN C.HolidayDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
						
						
						
						UNION ALL 
						
						
						
						-- BY MARKET CONFIGURATION
						
						SELECT 
						A.Division,
						
						CNF.Identifier,
						CNF.BranchID,
						CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID,
						
						
						(A.CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
						DATENAME(WEEKDAY, A.CalendarDate) AS DAY,
						CASE WHEN C.HolidayDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS HolidayFlag,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.NET_ISSUED,0)) 	AS NET_ISSUED,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.DEMO,0)) 		AS DEMO,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.SOLD,0))			AS SOLD,
						SUM(COALESCE(B.SET_COUNT,0))	AS SET_COUNT
						FROM #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH_N1 A 
						
						JOIN (SELECT * FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION] WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST' ) CNF
							ON A.BranchID = CNF.FilterBranch
						
							LEFT JOIN [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] B 
							ON A.Division = B.DIVISION
							AND A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
							AND A.BranchID = B.BranchID
							AND A.ProductID = B.ProductID
						
						LEFT JOIN [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR] C
						ON A.CalendarDate = C.HolidayDate
								
						GROUP BY 
						A.Division,
						CNF.Identifier,
						CNF.BranchID,
						A.CalendarDate,
						DATENAME(WEEKDAY, A.CalendarDate),
						CASE WHEN C.HolidayDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
						
						
						) M1
						
					) M2
			
			) M3

JOIN [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR] HL 
ON M3.CalendarDate = HL.HolidayDate;




-- ********************



SELECT 
Division,
Identifier,
BranchID,
ProductID,
CalendarDate,
DAY,
HolidayName,
CASE WHEN UPPER(DAY_Prev_Yr)='SUNDAY' THEN HL_NET_ISSUED_2 	ELSE HL_NET_ISSUED 	END	AS HOLIDAY_ADJ_NET_ISSUED ,
CASE WHEN UPPER(DAY_Prev_Yr)='SUNDAY' THEN HL_DEMO_2 		ELSE HL_DEMO 		END	AS HOLIDAY_ADJ_DEMO		  ,
CASE WHEN UPPER(DAY_Prev_Yr)='SUNDAY' THEN HL_SOLD_2 		ELSE HL_SOLD 		END	AS HOLIDAY_ADJ_SOLD		  ,
CASE WHEN UPPER(DAY_Prev_Yr)='SUNDAY' THEN HL_SET_COUNT_2	ELSE HL_SET_COUNT	END	AS HOLIDAY_ADJ_SET_COUNT  

INTO #T_HOLIDAY_ADJ_N1

FROM 
(
SELECT *,
LAG(HOLIDAY_ADJ_NET_ISSUED,1) 	OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,HOLIDAYNAME,DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CALENDARDATE) 			AS HL_NET_ISSUED,
LAG(HOLIDAY_ADJ_DEMO,1) 		OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,HOLIDAYNAME,DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CALENDARDATE) 			AS HL_DEMO,
LAG(HOLIDAY_ADJ_SOLD,1) 		OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,HOLIDAYNAME,DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CALENDARDATE) 			AS HL_SOLD,
LAG(HOLIDAY_ADJ_SET_COUNT,1)	OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,HOLIDAYNAME,DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CALENDARDATE) 			AS HL_SET_COUNT,
LAG(DAY,1) 						OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,HOLIDAYNAME,DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CALENDARDATE)			AS DAY_Prev_Yr,


LAG(HOLIDAY_ADJ_NET_ISSUED,2) 	OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,HOLIDAYNAME,DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CALENDARDATE) 			AS HL_NET_ISSUED_2,
LAG(HOLIDAY_ADJ_DEMO,2) 		OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,HOLIDAYNAME,DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CALENDARDATE) 			AS HL_DEMO_2,
LAG(HOLIDAY_ADJ_SOLD,2) 		OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,HOLIDAYNAME,DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CALENDARDATE) 			AS HL_SOLD_2,
LAG(HOLIDAY_ADJ_SET_COUNT,2)	OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,HOLIDAYNAME,DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CALENDARDATE) 			AS HL_SET_COUNT_2,
LAG(DAY,2) 						OVER (PARTITION BY Identifier,HOLIDAYNAME,DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CALENDARDATE)			AS DAY_Prev_Yr_2
FROM #T_HOLIDAY_ADJ_COMBINED

) M1;
  



  --********** START  :  UPDATE 2024, 2025 MAC GF market upadte since they didn't existed before ************


UPDATE A
SET 
    A.HOLIDAY_ADJ_NET_ISSUED = B.HOLIDAY_ADJ_NET_ISSUED,
    A.HOLIDAY_ADJ_DEMO       = B.HOLIDAY_ADJ_DEMO,
    A.HOLIDAY_ADJ_SOLD       = B.HOLIDAY_ADJ_SOLD,
	A.HOLIDAY_ADJ_SET_COUNT  = B.HOLIDAY_ADJ_SET_COUNT
FROM #T_HOLIDAY_ADJ_N1 A
JOIN (
	
		SELECT DISTINCT 
		Identifier,
		Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN ISNUMERIC(SUBSTRING(Identifier, CHARINDEX('_', Identifier) + 1, 4)) = 1
					AND LEN(SUBSTRING(Identifier, CHARINDEX('_', Identifier) + 1, 4)) = 4
			THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Identifier, CHARINDEX('_', Identifier) + 1, 4) AS INT) - 1
			ELSE YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1
		END AS MinYear
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION]
		WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST'
		
     ) CNF
    ON  A.Identifier = CNF.Identifier
    AND A.Division   = CNF.Division
JOIN #T_HOLIDAY_ADJ_N1 B
    ON  B.Identifier = 'BY_DIVISION'
    AND B.Division   = CNF.Division
    AND B.CalendarDate >= '2023-01-01'
    AND B.HOLIDAY_ADJ_NET_ISSUED != 0.00
    AND A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
WHERE A.CalendarDate >= '2023-01-01'
  AND A.HOLIDAY_ADJ_NET_ISSUED = 0.00
  AND YEAR(A.CalendarDate) >= CNF.MinYear;


--********** END  :  UPDATE 2024, 2025 MAC GF market upadte since they didn't existed before ************
  
  
 --********************************
 
 
 TRUNCATE TABLE [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_ADJUSTMENT];
 
 
 INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_ADJUSTMENT]

SELECT 
Division	,
Identifier	,
BranchID	,
ProductID	,
CalendarDate	,
DAY	,
HolidayName	,
HOLIDAY_ADJ_NET_ISSUED	,
HOLIDAY_ADJ_DEMO	,
HOLIDAY_ADJ_SOLD	,
HOLIDAY_ADJ_SET_COUNT
FROM #T_HOLIDAY_ADJ_N1;



--******** INSERT PREVIOUS YEAR HOLIDAYS FOR > GETDATE + 6 ***********




 INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_ADJUSTMENT]

SELECT 
M2.Division
,M2.Identifier
,M2.BranchID
,M2.ProductID
,M1.HolidayDate AS CalendarDate
,M2.DAY
,M2.HolidayName
,M2.HOLIDAY_ADJ_NET_ISSUED
,M2.HOLIDAY_ADJ_DEMO
,M2.HOLIDAY_ADJ_SOLD
,M2.HOLIDAY_ADJ_SET_COUNT

FROM
(
		SELECT * FROM 
		(
			SELECT *,
			LEAD(HolidayDate,1) OVER (PARTITION BY HolidayName ORDER BY HolidayDate DESC) AS HolidayDate_LY
			FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR] 
		) A
		WHERE HolidayDate > (SELECT MAX(CalendarDate) FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_ADJUSTMENT] )
		AND HolidayDate <= EOMONTH(GETDATE())
	
	) M1
JOIN [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_ADJUSTMENT]  M2
ON M1.HolidayDate_LY = M2.CalendarDate;

SELECT 
A.CalendarDate,
B.Division,
B.BranchID,
B.ProductID
INTO #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH
FROM
	(SELECT DISTINCT CalendarDate  FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] ) A
	JOIN 
	(SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
	WHERE BranchID IS NOT NULL) B
	ON 1=1;



--***********************************
-- OUTPUT 1 ( DEMO, SOLD, NET_ISSUED )
--***********************************




SELECT 
M3.Division,
M3.BranchID,
M3.ProductID,
M3.DAY,
M3.CalendarDate,
-- Holiday Adjustment taken in Forecast Step
AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ  			,
AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ  	,
AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ 			,
AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ

	
INTO #T_DATASET_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED
FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		Division,
		BranchID,
		ProductID,
		DAY,
		CalendarDate,
		
		CAST(
				CAST(
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_7 = 0 THEN DEMO_7 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN DEMO_14 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN DEMO_21 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN DEMO_28 ELSE 0 END, 0)
				AS DECIMAL(8,4)) /
			
				CAST(
					NULLIF(
						(CASE WHEN DEMO_7 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_7 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN DEMO_14 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN DEMO_21 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN DEMO_28 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
					0)
				AS DECIMAL(8,4))
		
		AS DECIMAL(8,4)) AS AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ,
		
		
		CAST(
				CAST(
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_7 = 0  THEN NET_ISSUED_7 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN NET_ISSUED_14 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN NET_ISSUED_21 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN NET_ISSUED_28 ELSE 0 END, 0)
				AS DECIMAL(8,4)) /
			
				CAST(
					NULLIF(
						(CASE WHEN NET_ISSUED_7 IS NOT NULL  AND HolidayFlag_7 = 0  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN NET_ISSUED_14 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN NET_ISSUED_21 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN NET_ISSUED_28 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
					0)
				AS DECIMAL(8,4))
		
		AS DECIMAL(8,4)) AS AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ,
		
		
		CAST(
				CAST(
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_7 = 0  THEN SOLD_7 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN SOLD_14 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN SOLD_21 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN SOLD_28 ELSE 0 END, 0)
				AS DECIMAL(8,4)) /
			
				CAST(
					NULLIF(
						(CASE WHEN SOLD_7 IS NOT NULL  AND HolidayFlag_7 = 0  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN SOLD_14 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN SOLD_21 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN SOLD_28 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
					0)
				AS DECIMAL(8,4))
		
		AS DECIMAL(8,4)) AS AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ,
		
		
		
		CAST(
				CAST(
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_7 = 0  THEN SET_COUNT_7 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN SET_COUNT_14 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN SET_COUNT_21 ELSE 0 END, 0) +
					ISNULL(CASE WHEN HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN SET_COUNT_28 ELSE 0 END, 0)
				AS DECIMAL(8,4)) /
			
				CAST(
					NULLIF(
						(CASE WHEN SET_COUNT_7 IS NOT NULL  AND HolidayFlag_7 = 0  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN SET_COUNT_14 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_14 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN SET_COUNT_21 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_21 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
						(CASE WHEN SET_COUNT_28 IS NOT NULL AND HolidayFlag_28 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
					0)
				AS DECIMAL(8,4))
		
		AS DECIMAL(8,4)) AS AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		
		
		
		FROM 
		(
		
		SELECT 
		Division,
		BranchID,
		ProductID,
		DAY,
		CalendarDate,
		MONTH_7,
		MONTH_14,
		MONTH_21,
		MONTH_28,
		COALESCE(DEMO_7, 0)   AS  DEMO_7  ,
		COALESCE(DEMO_14,0)   AS  DEMO_14 ,
		COALESCE(DEMO_21,0)   AS  DEMO_21 ,
		COALESCE(DEMO_28,0)   AS  DEMO_28 ,
		
		COALESCE(NET_ISSUED_7 ,0) AS NET_ISSUED_7   ,
		COALESCE(NET_ISSUED_14,0) AS NET_ISSUED_14  ,
		COALESCE(NET_ISSUED_21,0) AS NET_ISSUED_21  ,
		COALESCE(NET_ISSUED_28,0) AS NET_ISSUED_28  ,
		
		COALESCE(SOLD_7 ,0)		AS SOLD_7  ,
		COALESCE(SOLD_14,0)		AS SOLD_14 ,
		COALESCE(SOLD_21,0)		AS SOLD_21 ,
		COALESCE(SOLD_28,0)		AS SOLD_28 ,
		
		COALESCE(SET_COUNT_7 ,0)		AS SET_COUNT_7  ,
		COALESCE(SET_COUNT_14,0)		AS SET_COUNT_14 ,
		COALESCE(SET_COUNT_21,0)		AS SET_COUNT_21 ,
		COALESCE(SET_COUNT_28,0)		AS SET_COUNT_28 ,
				
		HolidayFlag_7,
		HolidayFlag_14,
		HolidayFlag_21,
		HolidayFlag_28
		
		FROM 
		(
				SELECT 
				Division,
				BranchID,
				ProductID,
				DAY,
				CalendarDate,
				DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_7,  CalendarDate) AS MONTH_7,
				DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_14, CalendarDate) AS MONTH_14,
				DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_21, CalendarDate) AS MONTH_21,
				DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_28, CalendarDate) AS MONTH_28,
				
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_7,   CalendarDate) = 1 THEN DEMO_7  * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE DEMO_7 END  AS DEMO_7, -- Seasonality Adj if the Month is Prev --wrt Calculation day
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_14,  CalendarDate) = 1 THEN DEMO_14 * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE DEMO_14 END AS DEMO_14,
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_21,  CalendarDate) = 1 THEN DEMO_21 * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE DEMO_21 END AS DEMO_21,
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_28,  CalendarDate) = 1 THEN DEMO_28 * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE DEMO_28 END AS DEMO_28,
				
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_7,   CalendarDate) = 1 THEN NET_ISSUED_7  * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE NET_ISSUED_7 END  AS NET_ISSUED_7,
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_14,  CalendarDate) = 1 THEN NET_ISSUED_14 * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE NET_ISSUED_14 END AS NET_ISSUED_14,
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_21,  CalendarDate) = 1 THEN NET_ISSUED_21 * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE NET_ISSUED_21 END AS NET_ISSUED_21,
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_28,  CalendarDate) = 1 THEN NET_ISSUED_28 * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE NET_ISSUED_28 END AS NET_ISSUED_28,
				
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_7,   CalendarDate) = 1 THEN SOLD_7  * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE SOLD_7 END  AS SOLD_7,
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_14,  CalendarDate) = 1 THEN SOLD_14 * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE SOLD_14 END AS SOLD_14,
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_21,  CalendarDate) = 1 THEN SOLD_21 * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE SOLD_21 END AS SOLD_21,
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_28,  CalendarDate) = 1 THEN SOLD_28 * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE SOLD_28 END AS SOLD_28,
				
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_7,   CalendarDate) = 1 THEN SET_COUNT_7  * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE SET_COUNT_7 END  AS SET_COUNT_7,
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_14,  CalendarDate) = 1 THEN SET_COUNT_14 * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE SET_COUNT_14 END AS SET_COUNT_14,
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_21,  CalendarDate) = 1 THEN SET_COUNT_21 * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE SET_COUNT_21 END AS SET_COUNT_21,
				CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, CalendarDate_28,  CalendarDate) = 1 THEN SET_COUNT_28 * SEASONALITY_ADJ ELSE SET_COUNT_28 END AS SET_COUNT_28,
				
				SEASONALITY_ADJ,
				
				LAG(HolidayFlag,7)  OVER (PARTITION BY  Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS HolidayFlag_7,
				LAG(HolidayFlag,14) OVER (PARTITION BY  Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS HolidayFlag_14,
				LAG(HolidayFlag,21) OVER (PARTITION BY  Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS HolidayFlag_21,
				LAG(HolidayFlag,28) OVER (PARTITION BY  Division,BranchID,ProductID ORDER BY CalendarDate) AS HolidayFlag_28
				
				FROM
				(	
						SELECT 
						M1.Division,
						M1.BranchID,
						M1.ProductID,
						DATENAME(WEEKDAY, M1.CalendarDate) AS DAY,
						M1.CalendarDate,
						LAG(M1.CalendarDate,7)  OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS CalendarDate_7,
						LAG(M1.CalendarDate,14) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS CalendarDate_14,
						LAG(M1.CalendarDate,21) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS CalendarDate_21,
						LAG(M1.CalendarDate,28) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS CalendarDate_28,
						
						LAG(DEMO,7)  OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS DEMO_7,
						LAG(DEMO,14) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS DEMO_14,
						LAG(DEMO,21) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS DEMO_21,
						LAG(DEMO,28) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS DEMO_28,
						
						LAG(NET_ISSUED,7)  OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS NET_ISSUED_7,
						LAG(NET_ISSUED,14) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS NET_ISSUED_14,
						LAG(NET_ISSUED,21) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS NET_ISSUED_21,
						LAG(NET_ISSUED,28) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS NET_ISSUED_28,
						
						LAG(SOLD,7)  OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS SOLD_7,
						LAG(SOLD,14) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS SOLD_14,
						LAG(SOLD,21) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS SOLD_21,
						LAG(SOLD,28) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS SOLD_28,
						
						LAG(SET_COUNT,7)  OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS SET_COUNT_7,
						LAG(SET_COUNT,14) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS SET_COUNT_14,
						LAG(SET_COUNT,21) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS SET_COUNT_21,
						LAG(SET_COUNT,28) OVER  (PARTITION BY M1.Division,M1.BranchID,M1.ProductID ORDER BY M1.CalendarDATE) AS SET_COUNT_28,
						
						
						1.00 AS SEASONALITY_ADJ, -- Seasonality Adjustment is removed as of now
						
						CASE WHEN C.HolidayDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS HolidayFlag
						
						FROM  #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH M1
						
						LEFT JOIN  [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] A
						ON  M1.Division 		= A.DIVISION
						AND M1.CalendarDate 	= A.CalendarDate
						AND M1.BranchID 		= A.BranchID
						AND M1.ProductID 		= A.ProductID
						
						LEFT JOIN [EDW_FCST].[DIM_ADJUSTMENT_SEASONALITY] B  
						ON EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,0,M1.CalendarDate)) = B.CalendarDate
						AND M1.Division	 = B.Division
						AND M1.BranchID  = B.BranchID
						AND M1.ProductID = B.ProductID
												
						LEFT JOIN [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR] C 
						ON M1.CalendarDate = C.HolidayDate
					
					
						) M1
					
					) M1_X
				
				) M2
			
			) M3;
			
-- HOLIDAY ADJUSTMENT -- Taken in Later step





TRUNCATE TABLE  [EDW_FCST].FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED;

INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED
SELECT *,GETDATE() FROM #T_DATASET_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED;
